blockingIssues.description: internal/config/config.go normalizes non-string YAML scalars like `ieee_api_key: false` into non-empty strings, so malformed global config can incorrectly enable gated sources or override endpoints instead of being ignored.

rejectedObservations.observation: Historical note: before the direct-cli alignment feature landed, `skills/search-paper` still described wrapper-mediated runtime config via `SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE` and a skill-local `.env`.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-planned in pending feature direct-cli-skill-release-alignment rather than a new scrutiny guidance update for this milestone
